Name: 0_car_new_like_just
Representative_Docs: ["That's not to say that Corolla's useful technology is limited to digital displays, however. With other great features available like automatic climate control, available power and heated front seats, a smart key system, and an available blind spot monitor with rear cross-traffic alert that warns drivers about objects just out of view, all of these features come together to perfectly round out this seriously convenient compact car.", "So I think, you know, we saw this in the show car and we wanted to make sure that this was something that we definitely put into the production vehicle, that it maintained it from show car to production. Right off the bat, I'll just say that we wanted to make this car look sexy and not particularly have the look of an electric car, to scream electric. We wanted it to be a sporty, aggressive, styling car.", "And even though this is a big car, this combined with the rear axle steering means I can enjoy a great drive with brilliant handling. Now let's take a look at the new EQS's beautiful exterior. The new EQS is setting a new standard for electric vehicles, so it's only fitting that the exterior design tells the same story."]

Name: 1_volvo_xc90_new_car
Representative_Docs: ['The all-new XC90. A new design, a new beginning. The all-new XC90.', "A year from now we'll be showing you the all-new XC90, which will feature Volvo's next generation of safety and driver support technologies. Most importantly though, the all-new XC90 will be the first Volvo model assembled on a scalable platform architecture, or what we like to call it, a SPOT. Going forward, all new Volvo models will be built on these highly adaptive, or should I say, scalable platforms.", 'There was huge interest when the all-new Volvo XC90 was unveiled to the world press. This car is the start signal for a new era for Volvo cars and the Volvo brand, where design, technology, environmental performance and safety are at a new, higher level. Volvo is well known to everybody, but now they see Volvo developing in direction, bringing in high-tech, very advanced solutions and technology really to strengthen our brand.']
